studies.title: Prospective Randomized Group Controlled Study of Clinical Efficacy and Safety of the  CE-marked Untire App

studies.title: A Prospective Multi-Center RCT Assessing Clinical Efficacy and Safety of the CE-marked Untire App®, Targeting Breast Cancer Patients (ICD-10 C50) with Cancer-Related Fatigue in the Post-Primary Treatment Phase of their Cancer, Powered to Detect Significant Fatigue Improvement (Untire-III-B)

_verification.reason: The study explicitly mentions the Untire App® by name, targets the same clinical area (breast cancer-related fatigue), and aligns with the described purpose and intervention of the Untire® product. The title also specifies it is a CE-marked app, which matches the product description.

_classification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions 'RCT' and describes a prospective, multi-center randomized controlled trial assessing clinical efficacy and safety, which aligns with RCT indicators such as randomization and interventional design.
